title: cyclosorus australis
intro: Cyclosorus australis, also known as the Austral Fern or Australian Cinnamon Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its distinctive cinnamon-like fronds. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus australis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its fronds can also be used in teas, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
